message: docs: Remove collapsible sections, show all content directly

-Full rescue script - ```bash # 1. Connect via plain SSH (bypass broken mux) ssh user@host @@ -416,8 +401,6 @@ wezterm-mux-server --daemonize tmux attach -t rescue ``` -
- ### Success Rate Typically **50–70%** of sessions migrate successfully.
